name: Million Clicker
short_description: A humorless clicker-toy, where you click a million times.
detailed_description:
Million Clicker is a short game where you click a button. Except by "short" I mean long, and by "game" I mean humorless experience. Join millions on their quest to get to the millionth click. If millions play the 'game,' that is.

Guide

Consistency is better than speed. If you click just once a minute, you can beat this game in one year, 10 months, and 25 days! That's just less than two years.

Clicking for that long means you'll want the most out of each press. Follow this guide to help you find your rhythm:

Place your two forefingers on your left mouse button, and erratically vibrate your forearm.

This will give your clicks a needed boost, if not tiring your arm faster.
